tracks.meaning: a hollow that something fits into, such as the eye socket where the eyeball sits
a network interface that allows a computer to connect to other computers or devices over a network
a hollow receptacle or opening into which something is inserted, such as a light bulb socket or electrical outlet
the part of a tool or implement that receives the handle or shaft, such as the socket of an axe
to hit a ball with solid contact, typically in cricket or baseball
to strike or punch someone forcefully
a bony cavity in the skull or other bone structure that holds an organ or body part in place
